untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires detection of '13 consecutive higher highs' (multi-bar sequence count) and '13 new price lines appearing after 8 new price lines' (pattern memory and phase detection). These require historical bar lookback and pattern state tracking beyond single-bar technical indicators. The specific candlestick pattern recognition (Thirteen New Price Lines) cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators without a dedicated pattern detector.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate with consecutively higher highs (high > prev_high) and price above moving average, but this does NOT capture the specific 13-bar pattern requirement or the series context (following 8-bar pattern). Exit condition set conservatively to close below 20-SMA as reversal signal since AUTHOR_SILENT. Success rates (57% bull, 74% bear) suggest context-dependent reliability requiring regime confirmation.
